creator: jkoshy@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch updates ports/deskutils/org-mode.el6 to the current release (v6.16a).

- There's a new patch file: files/patch-doc-org.
- The updated port installs the info file as "org6.info".
- The updated port also installs PDF documentation in $DOCSDIR.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
